purpose: Guide LLM rendering of natural Gangwon-style colloquial utterances without turning the dataset into mechanical word substitution.
rules: Use dialect as light surface flavor, not as the main semantic challenge.
Preserve the gold symptom meaning exactly.
Do not overuse rare dialect vocabulary.
Do not translate every word mechanically from standard Korean.
Keep the answer short and plausible for a clinic intake conversation.

allowed_usage.symptom_core: must remain understandable enough for a human reviewer
